file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: If you are a mobile for an extended period of time because of surgery, pregnancy, illness,

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: or travel, you may be at risk for deep vein thrombosis or DVT.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: A condition where a blood clot forms in a deep vein in the body, typically the leg.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: Unlike arteries which rely on the heart to force blood through them, veins transport blood

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: with the help of muscle contractions while you move and walk.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: Plans also have valves that keep blood from flowing backward and pooling in your arms and legs.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: When you are a mobile for an extended period, your venous circulation slows down.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: As a result, clotting factors in the blood may cause the slow moving blood to clump together,

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: forming a blood clot or thrombus.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: This condition is called deep vein thrombosis or DVT.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: Common symptoms of DVT include swelling of the leg or a vein in the leg, pain or tenderness

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: in the area, increased warmth in the skin, and red or discolored skin.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: In some DVT cases, a blood clot may detach from a deep vein and join the bloodstream.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: The clot travels from the deep veins of the leg through the veins of the abdomen,

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: into the heart, and finally lodges in the pulmonary artery or its branches, blocking blood flow

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: to the lungs.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: This condition called pulmonary embolism is very serious and may permanently damage a portion

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: of the lung.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: If a clot is large or if there are many clots, pulmonary embolism may also cause death.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: If you experience symptoms of PE, please tell your doctor or nurse immediately.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: These symptoms may include shortness of breath, a sudden sharp pain in the chest, a feeling

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: of lightheadedness or dizziness, rapid or irregular heartbeat, or coughing that produces

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: blood.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: To help prevent deep vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism, your doctor may require you

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: to do the following.

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: Walk around periodically to keep the blood from pooling in your legs, wear compression

file: ANH00029_Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism.mp4
title: ANH00029 Prevention of Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) and Pulmonary Embolism
text_en: stockings, and take anti-clothing medication.
